intent_yaml:
change_type: add_vlan
site: store-1842
targets:
  device_ids:
  - v2-store1
  device_group: access-switches
policy:
  pci_reachable: false
  internet_reachable: true
metadata:
  requested_by: e2e-final
  ticket_id: null
  learning_mode: true
vlan:
  id: 99
  name: E2E_LIVE
  subnet: 10.42.99.0/24
  purpose: guest
  svi:
    enabled: false
    gateway_ip: null

checks.title: Intent Schema
checks.message: Intent loaded into the add_vlan model.

checks.title: Target Resolution
checks.message: All requested target devices resolve in inventory.

checks.title: VLAN Policy
checks.message: VLAN ID and name match policy.

checks.title: Subnet Overlap
checks.message: Requested subnet does not overlap known site subnets.

checks.title: PCI Segmentation
checks.message: Segmentation policy is preserved for this intent.

checks.title: Rendered Config Scope
checks.message: Rendered config only touches the intended add_vlan feature scope.

checks.title: Deterministic Render
checks.message: Same intent renders to the same EOS config every time.
